headline: Conquistadors: Preseason Front Office Brief
executive_summary: Conquistadors is projected #1 of 16 with a 90.46 championship-lineup C-AVI average, led by Josh Allen, Puka Nacua, and Bijan Robinson. The immediate priority is improving the FLEX slot without weakening that core.

projected_power.method: Verified championship-lineup C-AVI average from all 16 AVI-Core knowledge team files

latest_trade.summary: On July 18, Conquistadors traded with Big Balder Brand and acquired 2026 Round 5 (original roster 1) while sending 2026 Round 1 (original roster 12). The deal sent out 1 draft asset, reducing future flexibility; The deal added 1 draft asset.

gap_closing_moves: Protect the league-leading projection and avoid replacing Juwan Johnson unless the incoming option clearly exceeds 63.5 C-AVI.
Use draft capital as a targeted sweetener for a verified starting-lineup upgrade, not for additional bench depth.
